text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week has found success in both the
Japanese Derby and the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rise is beginning to make waves throughout
the academy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Has Spe gotten even faster?!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
And there are a lot of really strong racers in the
same year as Spe...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Lately, it's like she's been heads and shoulders
above the rest of them too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, however...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I! Am! NUMERO UNO!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Sh-she's so fast! How is she so far ahead of everyone else?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Is this what someone who's run abroad is capable
of? There's no way we can keep up with her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
With luscious, dark-brown hair and a red mask,
it's the Phantom Bird!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's the world's hella strongest—El Condor Pasa!
Descending once more upon the grounds of
Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now then, time to get the party started as I aim
for the Japan Cup! Vamos!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is an extremely talented
Umamusume who has run in international races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm watching her...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... N-no way... She isn't even winded after a 1,600-meter scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... She even broke the track record!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder they call her the Beast! She's a
terror out there!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goodness... Hehe, seems like a rather
dramatic nickname is floating about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder—her incredible skills have made
her a household name ever since her junior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A formidable wall stands in the way of Special
Week as she aims to become number one.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That's it for today, Trainer! I probably
should start winding down and—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hola, Spe! May I have a word?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El? What's up?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Well...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I! Challenge! Yoooooou!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I heard about what you did in the Japanese Derby
and the spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You were so, so amazing! Even I was impressed!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Buuut! I'm not gonna let you be the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The strongest...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yup, numero uno!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We're both aiming to be the top Umamusume in
Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...That's right.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why I can't give it up to you! I won't give it up to you! I'm not gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We'll settle this in the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Gotcha. Let's square off in the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week accepts the challenge from the
Phantom Bird, El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Spe... I see. So you're finally going to race against
El...
